title: lilium tenuifolium var. chrysanthum
intro: Lilium tenuifolium var. chrysanthum, also known as the golden lilyturf or golden lilyturf grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the lily family. The golden lilyturf has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, and it is also used to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the golden lilyturf is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
